note: Broiler implements CSS Box Model 4 margin-trim (CssBox.ApplyMarginTrim) and renders the correct filled square. The Chromium/Edge oracle does not support margin-trim, so the reference shows gapped boxes; this case can never match the oracle. Excluded to avoid a permanent false-positive triage signal (issues #178, #180).
